gitTreeStateScope: working tree status excluding generated 2024-env snapshot, reports, paper tables, and paper figures

scope.validationMode: closed historical window, not latest moving data

sources.description: LDA 2024 Q1-Q4 LD-2 activity reports, post-filtered to ENV and EPA-facing contacts when live payloads are available.
sources.statusNotes: lda-first_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-second_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-third_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended); lda-fourth_quarter: ok (normalized rows appended)

sources.description: FEC 2024 cycle party committee contributions and OpenFEC Schedule E independent expenditures. Public-financing and opaque-capacity bridge rows are stored in separate panels.
sources.statusNotes: fec-C00010603: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00042366: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00000935: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00003418: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00027466: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-C00075820: ok (normalized rows appended); fec-schedule-e: ok (normalized independent-expenditure rows appended)

sources.description: Public financing and voucher bridge rows for direct program participation and public-fund share diagnostics.
sources.requestTemplate: PUBLIC_FINANCING_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py nyc-public-financing --output data/raw/public-financing.csv or PUBLIC_FINANCING_LIVE_CSV=/path/to/program-export.csv ./scripts/fetch-public-financing.sh --live
sources.statusNotes: public-financing: ok (normalized NYC CFB public-financing rows written)

sources.description: Explicit dark-money rows from a configured source export or IRS EO BMF 501(c)(4)/(c)(6) opaque-capacity proxy rows; donor identities remain unobserved.
sources.requestTemplate: DARK_MONEY_SOURCE_NATIVE=1 python3 scripts/fetch-source-data.py irs-dark-money-capacity --output data/raw/dark-money.csv or DARK_MONEY_LIVE_CSV=/path/to/export.csv ./scripts/fetch-dark-money.sh --live
sources.statusNotes: dark-money: ok (normalized IRS EO BMF opaque-capacity proxy rows written)

sources.description: EPA 2024 Regulations.gov/Federal Register rulemaking docket and document slice.
sources.statusNotes: regulations-gov: ok (normalized rows appended); federal-register: ok (normalized rows appended)

sources.description: EPA fiscal-year 2024 USAspending award panel for procurement concentration, SAM/FPDS bridge identifiers, competition, modification, and firewall moments.
sources.statusNotes: usaspending: ok (normalized EPA award rows written)

sources.description: Normalized revolving-door source panel from a licensed/exported CSV or LDA covered-position derivation, with fixture fallback.
sources.statusNotes: revolving-door: ok (derived normalized covered-position rows from LDA source)

sources.description: Normalized nonprofit, 527, think-tank, campaign-intermediary, and association panel from NYC CFB, IRS EO BMF, ProPublica, OpenSecrets, or curated source exports.
sources.statusNotes: intermediary: ok (NYC CFB intermediary rows; IRS EO BMF nonprofit/association capacity rows; )
